---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? A clear description of the pain point.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this to work.

## Which Layers Are Affected?

- [ ] Domain (Entities, Events)
- [ ] Application (Handlers, Commands, Queries, Validators)
- [ ] Infrastructure (Repositories, Data Access)
- [ ] API (Controllers, Middleware)

## Does This Require a New Data Provider Implementation?

- [ ] Yes - needs implementation in EntityFramework, Dapper, and ADO.NET repositories
- [ ] No - does not involve data access

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information, mockups, or references.
